task: Put the white cable in the storage box
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A white cable is coiled on a shelf, with a black storage box nearby. The cable is flexible and tangled; the box has an open top. STRATEGY - First, grasp the cable to untangle it slightly for easier handling. Then, transport it to the box and insert it into the open top. Failure modes include dropping the cable or misaligning it with the box. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the cable body to grasp it; Step 2 grasp the cable body to lift it; Step 3 transport the cable to the box; Step 4 insert the cable into the box top.
Goal: inside(white_cable, storage_box)
Scene: white_cable, storage_box, shelf
Step 1: reach(white_cable)
  affordance_region: the body of the white cable
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, white_cable, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, white_cable) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(white_cable)
  affordance_region: the body of the white cable
  contact: holding(white_cable) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(white_cable)
Step 3: transport(white_cable -> storage_box)
  affordance_region: an empty area on top of the storage_box
  spatial: above(white_cable, storage_box, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(white_cable)
  done_when: above(white_cable, storage_box, 0.05)
Step 4: insert(white_cable -> storage_box)
  affordance_region: the open top of the storage_box
  contact: surface_contact(white_cable, storage_box) [completion]; released(white_cable) [completion]
  pose: inside(white_cable, storage_box) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(white_cable, storage_box) AND released(white_cable)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the white cable
the body of the white cable
an empty area on top of the storage_box
the open top of the storage_box
